topic: Your Stomach Acid Can Dissolve Metal

script.hook: Your stomach acid can dissolve a razor blade.
script.explanation: It runs at pH 1.5. Strong enough to break down bone and metal. Your stomach lining replaces itself every three days just to survive.
script.punchline: Your body destroys and rebuilds itself nonstop. Follow for more.

script_full_text: Your stomach acid can dissolve a razor blade. More corrosive than battery acid. It runs at pH 1.5. Strong enough to break down bone and metal. Your stomach lining replaces itself every three days just to survive. Your body destroys and rebuilds itself nonstop. Follow for more.
